hero.title: Master React Native
hero.description: Learn how to build high-performance mobile applications for iOS and Android using React Native with real-world projects and best practices.

rn basics.description: Learn React Native fundamentals including setup, components, and core concepts.

components & styling.description: Work with core components, styling, Flexbox, and responsive layouts.

navigation.description: Handle navigation using React Navigation including stacks, tabs, and drawers.

state management.description: Manage application state using hooks, Context API, Redux, or Zustand.

api & data.description: Fetch and manage data using APIs, Axios, and async storage.

native features.description: Access device features like camera, location, notifications, and sensors.

performance & optimization.description: Optimize performance using memoization, FlatList optimization, and debugging tools.

deployment & build.description: Build, test, and deploy apps to Play Store and App Store.

seo.title: About This React Native Tutorial Series
seo.description: React Native is a popular framework for building cross-platform mobile applications using JavaScript and React. In this tutorial series, you will learn React Native from basics to advanced concepts including components, navigation, APIs, performance optimization, and deployment.
